emails.subject: Aquila  outgoing guaranty (ref: gty2846.doc)
emails.body: Aquila outgoing guaranty (ref: gty2846.doc) Dan, Per our conversation on Friday regarding HPL, please coordinate with Clement to issue a new guaranty. As you recall, Aquila Energy Marketing Corporation has $50MM of exposure from HPL and they have requested additional security above the amount in the current guaranty listing HPL (gty2846.doc). Please issue a new guaranty for HPL covering Aquila Energy Marketing Corporation for physical natural gas in the amount of $50MM. In addition, please put language in this guaranty which would amend the existing guaranty (gty2846.doc) that would remove HPL. Thank you, Russell
